freezingDeath.one: Un aldeano muere congelado en el frío.
freezingDeath.other: {{count}} aldeanos mueren congelados en el frío.

madnessDeath.one: Un aldeano sucumbe a la locura y se quita la vida.
madnessDeath.other: {{count}} aldeanos sucumben a la locura y se quitan la vida.

investmentComplete.success: Inversión de {{amount}} de oro completada: Éxito. Has ganado {{payout}} de oro.
investmentComplete.successLucky: Inversión de {{amount}} de oro completada: ¡Suerte! Has ganado {{payout}} de oro.
investmentComplete.wipeout: Inversión de {{amount}} de oro completada: Pérdida total. Perdiste toda tu inversión de {{amount}} de oro.
investmentComplete.failure: Inversión de {{amount}} de oro completada: Fracaso. Perdiste {{loss}} de oro.

stranger.variant0: Un extraño se acerca y se une a la aldea.
stranger.variant1: Un viajero llega y decide quedarse.
stranger.variant2: Un caminante aparece y pasa a formar parte de la comunidad.
stranger.variant3: Alguien se acerca a la aldea y se establece.
stranger.variant4: Un extraño se une a la comunidad.
stranger.variant5: Un recién llegado aparece y se instala.
stranger.multiple0: {{count}} extraños se unen a la aldea.
stranger.multiple2: {{count}} caminantes llegan y se unen a la comunidad.

building.darkEstate: The Dark Estate stands has been built on a small hill near the village, offering solitude and refuge.
building.blacksmith: The blacksmith's forge comes alive. The heart of industry now beats in the village.
building.firstWoodenHut: The first wooden hut stands complete, this could be the start of something great.
building.villageGrowthSuggestion: The village grows quickly. Perhaps stone houses could shelter more villagers.
building.cityGrowthMilestone: The city has grown into a bustling metropolis, alive with trade, industry, and the promise of brighter days.
building.moonstoneDiscovered: In the depth of the pit, the workers discover something extraordinary. They uncover veins of moonstone - a luminescent mineral containing immense energy.
building.foundry: The foundry roars to life as fire and heat fuse raw materials.
building.masterworkFoundry: The Masterwork Foundry stands complete, a monument to supreme metallurgical mastery. Within its fires, blacksteel can be forged, nearly unbreakable, but very difficult to produce.
building.altar: An altar rises at the forest's edge, raised to appease what dwells within.
building.grandHunterLodge: The Grand Hunter Lodge is complete, a magnificent structure where master hunters gather.
building.clerksHut: A clerks hut is erected, its occupant ready to track the flow of resources with meticulous care.
building.scriptorium: The Scriptorium stands complete. Every detail of village life now gets tracked with meticulous precision.
building.inkwardenAcademy: The Inkwarden Academy rises as a monument to knowledge. Its halls filled with the wisdom of ages, and every resource is now tracked with unparalleled precision.
building.tannery: The Tannery is complete. The smell of curing leather fills the air as craftsmen begin their work.
building.highTannery: The High Tannery is built, a grand workshop where expert craftsmen transform hides into the finest leather.
building.longhouse: The first longhouse rises, a massive wooden hall with thick timbers and lots of space.
building.furTents: The first fur tents are raised at the village edge, giving more people warm shelter.
building.shrine: A sacred shrine rises beside the altar, its presence bringing peace and focus to troubled minds.
building.temple: A grand temple stands complete, its sacred halls echoing with whispered prayers that calm the tormented soul.
building.sanctum: The sanctum rises as a beacon of divine protection, its blessed aura driving away the darkest thoughts and fears.
building.alchemistHall: The Alchemist's Halls stand tall, their chambers filled with bubbling crucibles and gleaming instruments of forgotten craft.
building.tradePost: A trade post is built near the forest attracting tradesman who look to sell their goods for gold.
building.grandBazaar: The Grand Bazaar rises, a sprawling marketplace where merchants from distant lands gather to trade goods.
building.merchantsGuild: The Merchants Guild stands complete, a powerful organization that controls all trade routes and brings unprecedented wealth to your settlement.
building.bastion: The bastion rises like a mountain of stone, its walls thick and unyielding. A promise of protection against whatever stirs in the depths below.
building.wizardTower: The Wizard Tower spirals into the sky, crackling with arcane energy. The wizard moves in with his collection of ancient tomes and mysterious artifacts.
building.fortifiedMoat: A deep moat now surrounds the settlement, its waters dark and treacherous. No enemy will cross it easily.
building.traps: Traps have been laid around the village perimeter. Hidden pits, snares, and sharpened stakes await any who dare attack.
building.improvedTraps: The village perimeter is reinforced with covered pits, spring snares, and steel mechanisms. Attackers face a far deadlier welcome.
building.blackMonolith: The Black Monolith rises from the village center, a towering monument of dark adamant. Its surface seems to drink in the light, and the villagers gather around it with reverence and fear.
building.blackEstate: The Black Estate rises from the hill, encircled by a veil of mist.
building.chitinPlating: The fortifications are now reinforced with chitin plating. The village's defense is significantly increased.
building.pillarOfClarity: The Pillar of Clarity rises, a shimmering obelisk that seems to hum with ancient power. Its presence brings a sense of calm and focus to those nearby.
building.boneTemple: The Bone Temple rises from thousands of carefully arranged bones, a monument to the old gods. Its presence emanates dark power, and the villagers approach it with reverence and fear.
building.heartfire: The Heartfire is lit. Its warmth and light bring a new sense of purpose to the village.

gameplay.forestUnlocked: The village is encircled by a dense, dark forest. Danger lingers in the air, though it may also be a good place to chop wood and hunt.
gameplay.villageBegins: A small village begins to take shape. Villagers need food and wood to survive.
